title: CBI Annual Review (English) — PDF editions retrieved via Wayback Machine
source_org: Central Bank of the Islamic Republic of Iran (CBI)
time_coverage: Iranian fiscal years 1379-1395 and 1396-1401 (2000/01-2016/17, 2016/17-2022/23) -- effectively continuous FY1379-FY1401 (2000-2023), only missing FY1401's own gap-check and anything before FY1379.
units: described within each PDF (rial-denominated statistical tables, national accounts, monetary aggregates)
license_terms: CBI public publication; no explicit license stated on site
notes:
Direct curl to cbi.ir/tsd.cbi.ir is blocked by an F5/TSPD JS bot-challenge (confirmed in prior session, logs/downloads/iran-official.log). Retrieved instead via Wayback Machine CDX API: fetched a recent snapshot of the AnnualReview_en.aspx listing page (timestamp 20241007182632) to enumerate the /page/{id}.aspx links for each fiscal-year edition, then fetched each /page/{id}.aspx directly from Wayback (mimetype application/pdf in the CDX index — these page IDs serve the PDF binary directly, no separate landing page). All files verified as real PDF binaries (magic bytes %PDF, `file` command confirms PDF document) — no TSPD/bot-challenge signatures found. Could not obtain earlier editions (1390-1395) or later (1401+) in this pass; CDX index has snapshots for those page IDs too if needed later. tsd.cbi.ir (Economic Time Series DB) was unreachable (connect timeout) in the prior direct-fetch attempt and was not retried here — out of scope for this mopup pass.

CONTINUATION PASS (2026-07-13, main-thread agent, no sub-agents): Extended this collection dramatically using the SAME proven Wayback-CDX method as the original pass, applied to a MUCH richer source: fetched a 2025-04-27 Wayback snapshot of the CBI Annual Review listing page (cbi.ir/simplelist/AnnualReview_en.aspx), which lists 18 distinct 'Annual Review for <fiscal year>' entries with their own /page/<id>.aspx download links, spanning FY1379 (2000/01) through FY1395 (2016/17) plus FY1401 (2022/23) -- far more than the 5 editions (FY1396-1400) found in the original pass, which apparently only checked a more recent, shorter listing snapshot. All 18 new PDFs fetched via Wayback CDX (confirmed application/pdf mimetype snapshots for each /page/<id>.aspx, one per file), verified as real PDF documents via `file` command and spot-checked via pdftotext (FY1379 edition opens with 'Annual Review 1379 (2000/01) Prepared by: Economic Research and Policy Department CENTRAL BANK OF THE ISLAMIC REPUBLIC OF IRAN' -- confirms authenticity, not an error page). Combined with the pre-existing FY1396-1400 editions, the database's CBI Annual Review (English) holdings are now EFFECTIVELY CONTINUOUS from FY1379 through FY1401 (2000-2023), a 23-year unbroken run of the central bank's own annual statistical/narrative report -- a major upgrade from the previous 5 scattered recent years. NOTE: this listing snapshot mixed multiple publication categories (Annual Review, Economic Trends, Occasional Papers, structural/organizational pages) -- only entries whose anchor text explicitly read 'Annual Review for <year>' were downloaded; several other /page/<id>.aspx links on the same listing page (e.g. ids 1389, 1440-1475, 2072, 8020, 8088, 14286, 15713-15747, 16416-adjacent) were checked and confirmed to be non-Annual-Review content (Organization, Iran Cheque, National Jewels, Banking Profit Rates, Economic Statistics landing pages, security-features/paper-mill pages, clearance-systems pages) and correctly excluded. FY1378 and earlier (pre-2000) Annual Review editions were NOT found on this listing snapshot -- either they don't exist in English/PDF form that far back, or a different/older listing page URL structure would be needed; flagged as a possible future lead but not pursued further this pass. Total new download size ~26MB (18 files), well within the project's 500MB per-file cap and folder-size norms.

failures.reason: F5/TSPD bot-challenge blocks direct curl (confirmed prior session)
connect timeout, not retried this session (out of scope)
